objective: Validate whether qubit-state tomography combined with known dispersive wait evolution and calibrated cavity displacement can recover effective Fock-resolved qubit output states of a black-box SQR gate using forward simulation, constrained least squares, and MLE ground-truth validation.
hypotheses: Single-qubit Cholesky MLE provides a trustworthy baseline with fidelity improving monotonically with shot count.
Wait-only tomography recovers weighted transverse Fock-sector information for Fock-diagonal outputs.
Displacement-only tomography is uninformative after tracing out the cavity.
Combined displacement-plus-wait reveals cavity coherences through diagonal-model residuals but does not identify p_n or Z_n separately.
Full-state Cholesky-plus-softmax MLE is non-unique under the stated measurement constraints.
assumptions: Two-mode dispersive transmon-storage model with rad/s frequencies and seconds unless a cqed_sim tomography helper explicitly uses ns.
Logical Fock window n = 0..3 with convergence spot checks at larger truncation.
Informative protocol ordering is displacement then known dispersive wait then qubit tomography rotation.
Shot noise is always included; robustness studies add small rotation, displacement, chi, and chi-prime calibration errors plus wait-time decoherence surrogates.
Full p_n and Z_n recovery is not claimed unless an extra assumption or measurement primitive removes the analytic nullspace.

success_criteria.single_qubit_baseline: Mean fidelity exceeds 0.995 at the high-shot end of the baseline sweep.
success_criteria.recoverable_transverse_inference: Wait-only and/or combined inference reconstruct weighted transverse sector amplitudes accurately on diagonal benchmark cases.
success_criteria.displacement_only_null_result: Displacement-only design matrix remains rank deficient and reconstruction fails.
success_criteria.full_state_mle_nullspace: Multiple random restarts yield materially different p_n / Z_n assignments at nearly identical objective value, or an exact gauge-family construction exhibits the same degeneracy directly.
success_criteria.coherence_witness: Combined-protocol residuals separate coherent from diagonal cases by a clear margin.
success_criteria.pulse_level_consistency: Near-ideal pulse-level cases follow the same identifiability boundary as the analytic cases.

Implement the diagnostic full-state MLE and explicit gauge-family non-identifiability construction
Generate ideal and pulse-level black-box case libraries
Run the study, validate results, generate figures, write the report, and create the reproducibility notebook
